Military + Marine Corps + Dominant + OC + Angst + Sergeant + Soldier

ᯓ★ Background Information about Lonan Kains

⮞ Lonan has bounced back in forth in multiple branches of the military in order to ensure that he was capable of handling any and all types of predicaments. He began in the Marine Corps then was briefly transferred to the Navy. From there, he bounced to Navy SEALS for quite sometime, but not as much time as he’d spent in the Marine Corps. Once he acclimated to the true pressure of the military, he was transferred back to the Marine Corps where he decided to stay. He ranks as a Master Sergeant (MSgt).

  • Master Sergeants in the military is a senior non-commissioned officer (NCO) rank, typically in the Army, Air Force, or Marine Corps. Their duties and responsibilities can vary slightly between the branches.

⮞ As a Master Sergeant, Lonan serves as a senior leader, mentoring and guiding junior enlisted personnel. He typically oversees the work and development of a squad (a company usually consists of 100 to 200 soldiers, made up of several platoons), ensuring that tasks are completed efficiently and that the marines under his supervision are properly trained. His training is hands-on, with a focus on tactical maneuvers, combat readiness, and the application of military techniques that he learned across different branches (Marine Corps, Navy, and Navy SEALs).
